title: Career Development: AI SEO & GEO Visibility
description:
By the end of this course, you will be able to translate your AI SEO and digital marketing skills into clear, job-ready career outcomes. You will learn how to position your learning, projects, and decision-making experience for entry-level and early-career roles in today’s AI-influenced marketing landscape.

This course focuses on professional readiness and practical execution for digital marketing careers. You will explore the day-to-day responsibilities of roles such as Digital Marketing Analyst, SEO Specialist, and AI SEO Associate, and identify the skills employers expect at the CB2 level. Through guided activities, you will convert your coursework and project experience into resume-ready statements and practice clearly explaining your approach, decisions, and results in interviews.

What makes this course unique is its emphasis on clarity and confidence. Rather than generic career advice, it helps you articulate real, AI-driven marketing experience using structured frameworks. By the end of the course, you will be prepared to communicate your value professionally and take the next step toward launching your career in AI-enabled digital marketing.
